title: Surah Al-Ikhlas, Surah Al-Falaq, and Surah An-Nas
title_full: Surah Al-Ikhlas, Surah Al-Falaq, and Surah An-Nas
arabic: سُورَةُ الإِخْلَاص (٣ مَرَّات) سُورَةُ الفَلَق (٣ مَرَّات) سُورَةُ النَّاس (٣ مَرَّات)
transliteration: Surat Al-Ikhlas (3 marrat) Surat Al-Falaq (3 marrat) Surat An-Nas (3 marrat)
translation: Surah Al-Ikhlas (3 times) Surah Al-Falaq (3 times) Surah An-Nas (3 times)
reference: رواه أبو داود ٥٠٨٢ الترمذي ٢٥٧٥ (Narrated by Abu Dawud: 5082, At-Tirmidhi: 2575)

title: Declaration of Monotheism
title_full: Declaration of Monotheism
arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ المُلْكُ وَلَهُ الحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ. (مرة، أو ١٠ مرات، أو ١٠٠ مرة)
transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd, wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir. (Marrah, aw 10 marrat, aw 100 marrah)
translation: There is no true god except Allah alone, Who has no partner. To Him belongs dominion, and to Him belongs praise, and He is Able to do all things. (1 time, 10 times, or 100 times)
reference: البخاري: ٦٤٠٤، ومسلم: ٢٦٩١، أبو داود: ٥٠٧٧ (Al-Bukhari: 6404, Muslim: 2691, Abu Dawud: 5077)

title: Glorification of Allah
title_full: Glorification of Allah
arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ. (١٠٠ مرة)
transliteration: Subhanallahi wa bihamdih. (100 marrah)
translation: Glory be to Allah and pristine is His praise. (100 times)

title: Protection Against Harm
title_full: Protection Against Harm
arabic: بِاسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ. (٣ مَرَّات)
transliteration: Bismillahil-ladhi la yadurru ma'as-mihi shay'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'i wa huwas-sami'ul-'alim. (3 marrat)
translation: In the name of Allah, with Whose name nothing can cause harm on earth or in the heaven, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing. (3 times)
reference: أبو داود: ٥٠٨٨، والترمذي: ٣٣٨٨، وابن ماجه: ٣٨٦٩ (Abu Dawud: 5088, At-Tirmidhi: 3388, Ibn Majah: 3869)

title: Contentment with Allah, Islam, and the Prophet
title_full: Contentment with Allah, Islam, and the Prophet
arabic: رَضِينَا بِاللهِ رَبَّاً، وَبِالْإِسْلَامِ دِيناً، وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ رَسُولاً.
transliteration: Radina billahi Rabban, wa bil-Islami dinan, wa bi-Muhammadin (Sallallahu 'alayhi wa sallam) Rasula.
translation: We are pleased with Allah as our Lord, with Islam as our religion, and with Muhammad ﷺ as our Messenger.

title: Sufficiency in Allah
title_full: Sufficiency in Allah
arabic: حَسْبِيَ اللهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ. (٧ مَرَّات)
transliteration: Hasbiyallahu la ilaha illa hu, 'alayhi tawakkaltu wa huwa Rabbul-'Arshil-'Azim. (7 marrat)
translation: Allah is sufficient for me. There is no true god except Him. In Him I put my trust, and He is the Lord of the Mighty Throne. (7 times)

title: Affirmation of the Pure Fitrah and Religion
title_full: Affirmation of the Pure Fitrah and Religion
arabic: أَصْبَحْنَا عَلَى فِطْرَةِ الْإِسْلَامِ، وَكَلِمَةِ الْإِخْلَاصِ، وَسُنَّةِ نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ، وَمِلَّةِ أَبِينَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ، حَنِيفاً مُسْلِماً وَمَا كَانَ مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ.
transliteration: Asbahna 'ala fitratil-Islam, wa kalimatil-ikhlas, wa sunnati Nabiyyina Muhammadin (Sallallahu 'alayhi wa sallam), wa millati abina Ibrahima, hanifan musliman wa ma kana minal-mushrikin.
translation: We have entered the morning upon the natural disposition of Islam, the word of sincere faith, the religion of our Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, and the faith of our father Abraham, upright and submitting to Allah, and he was not of those who associate partners with Him.

title: Morning Supplication for the Good of the Day
title_full: Morning Supplication for the Good of the Day
arabic: أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ، رَبِّ أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ مَا فِي هَذَا الْيَوْمِ وَخَيْرَ مَا بَعْدَهُ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا فِي هَذَا الْيَوْمِ وَشَرِّ مَا بَعْدَهُ، رَبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْكَسَلِ وَسُوءِ الْكِبَرِ، رَبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابٍ فِي النَّارِ وَعَذَابٍ فِي الْقَبْرِ.
transliteration: Asbahna wa asbahal-mulku lillah, wal-hamdu lillah, la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir. Rabbi as'aluka khayra ma fi hadhal-yawmi wa khayra ma ba'dahu, wa a'udhu bika min sharri ma fi hadhal-yawmi wa sharri ma ba'dahu. Rabbi a'udhu bika minal-kasali wa su'il-kibar, Rabbi a'udhu bika min 'adhabin fin-nari wa 'adhabin fil-qabr.
translation: We have entered the morning, and the dominion belongs to Allah, and all praise is due to Allah. There is no true god except Allah alone, Who has no partner. To Him belongs dominion, and to Him belongs praise, and He is Able to do all things. My Lord, I ask You for the good of this day and the good of what follows it, and I seek refuge in You from the evil of this day and the evil of what follows it. My Lord, I seek refuge in You from laziness and the hardships of old age. My Lord, I seek refuge in You from punishment in the Fire and punishment in the grave.

title: Entering the Morning by Allah's Grace
title_full: Entering the Morning by Allah's Grace
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا، وَبِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا، وَبِكَ نَحْيَا، وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ، وَإِلَيْكَ النُّشُورُ.
transliteration: Allahumma bika asbahna, wa bika amsayna, wa bika nahya, wa bika namutu, wa ilaykan-nushur.
translation: O Allah, by You we enter the morning, and by You we enter the evening, by You we live, and by You we die, and to You is the final resurrection.

title: Bearing Witness to Monotheism
title_full: Bearing Witness to Monotheism
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَصْبَحْتُ أُشْهِدُكَ، وَأُشْهِدُ حَمَلَةَ عَرْشِكَ، وَمَلَائِكَتَكَ، وَجَمِيعَ خَلْقِكَ، أَنَّكَ أَنْتَ اللهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ، وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّداً عَبْدُكَ وَرَسُولُكَ. (مرة أو مرتين أو ٣ مرات أو ٤ مرات)
transliteration: Allahumma inni asbahtu ush-hiduka, wa ush-hidu hamalata 'arshika, wa mala'ikataka, wa jami'a khalqika, annaka Antallahu la ilaha illa Anta wahdaka la sharika lak, wa anna Muhammadan 'abduka wa Rasuluk. (Marrah aw marratayn aw 3 marrat aw 4 marrat)
translation: O Allah, I have entered the morning and I call You to witness, and I call the bearers of Your Throne, Your angels, and all of Your creation to witness, that You are Allah, there is no true god except You alone, You have no partner, and that Muhammad is Your servant and Your Messenger. (1, 2, 3, or 4 times)

title: Gratitude for Blessings
title_full: Gratitude for Blessings
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ مَا أَصْبَحَ بِي مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ أَوْ بِأَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ فَمِنْكَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ، فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَلَكَ الشُّكْرُ.
transliteration: Allahumma ma asbaha bi min ni'matin aw bi-ahadin min khalqika faminka wahdaka la sharika lak, falakal-hamdu wa lakash-shukr.
translation: O Allah, whatever blessing has come to me or to any of Your creation this morning is from You alone, You have no partner. To You belongs all praise and to You belongs all thanks.
reference: أبو داود (٥٠٧٣) ابن حبان (٨٥٨) (Abu Dawud: 5073, Ibn Hibban: 858)

title: Supplication of the Ever-Living
title_full: Supplication of the Ever-Living
arabic: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ أَسْتَغِيثُ أَصْلِحْ لِي شَأْنِي كُلَّهُ وَلَا تَكِلْنِي إِلَى نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ.
transliteration: Ya Hayyu Ya Qayyumu bi-rahmatika astaghith, aslih li sha'ni kullahu wa la takilni ila nafsi tarfata 'ayn.
translation: O Ever-Living, O Sustainer, by Your mercy I seek help. Rectify all of my affairs for me, and do not leave me to myself even for the blink of an eye.

title: Prayer for Well-being and Protection from Misbelief
title_full: Prayer for Well-being and Protection from Misbelief
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَدَنِي، اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي سَمْعِي، اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَصَرِي، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْكُفْرِ وَالْفَقْرِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ. (٣ مَرَّات)
transliteration: Allahumma 'afini fi badani, Allahumma 'afini fi sam'i, Allahumma 'afini fi basari, la ilaha illa Anta. Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-kufri wal-faqr, Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min 'adhabil-qabr, la ilaha illa Anta. (3 marrat)
translation: O Allah, grant me well-being in my body. O Allah, grant me well-being in my hearing. O Allah, grant me well-being in my sight. There is no true god except You. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from disbelief and poverty. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave. There is no true god except You. (3 times)

title: Prayer for Well-being and Comprehensive Security
title_full: Prayer for Well-being and Comprehensive Security
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي دِينِي وَدُنْيَايَ وَأَهْلِي وَمَالِي، اللَّهُمَّ اسْتُرْ عَوْرَاتِي وَآمِنْ رَوْعَاتِي، اللَّهُمَّ احْفَظْنِي مِنْ بَيْنِ يَدَيَّ، وَمِنْ خَلْفِي، وَعَنْ يَمِينِي، وَعَنْ شِمَالِي, وَمِنْ فَوْقِي، وَأَعُوذُ بِعَظَمَتِكَ أَنْ أُغْتَالَ مِنْ تَحْتِي.
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'alukal-'afiyah fid-dunya wal-akhirah. Allahumma inni as'alukal-'afwa wal-'afiyah fi dini wa dunyaya wa ahli wa mali. Allahumma-stur 'awrati wa amin raw'ati. Allahumma-hfazni min bayni yadayya, wa min khalfi, wa 'an yamini, wa 'an shimali, wa min fawqi, wa a'udhu bi-'azamatika an ughtala min tahti.
translation: O Allah, I ask You for well-being in this world and the Next. O Allah, I ask You for forgiveness and well-being in my religion, my worldly life, my family, and my wealth. O Allah, conceal my faults and calm my fears. O Allah, protect me from before me, from behind me, from my right, from my left, and from above me; and I seek refuge in Your greatness from being swallowed up from beneath me.

title: Lord of the Unseen and Protection from Evil
title_full: Lord of the Unseen and Protection from Evil
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ عَالِمَ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ، فَاطِرَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ، رَبَّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمَلِيكَهُ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي، وَمِنْ شَرِّ الشَّيْطَانِ وَشِرْكِهِ، وَأَنْ أَقْتَرِفَ عَلَى نَفْسِي سُوءاً، أَوْ أَجُرَّهُ إِلَى مُسْلِمٍ.
transliteration: Allahumma 'Alimal-ghaybi wash-shahadah, Fatiras-samawati wal-ard, Rabba kulli shay'in wa malikah, ash-hadu an la ilaha illa Anta, a'udhu bika min sharri nafsi, wa min sharrish-shaytani wa shirkih, wa an aqtarifa 'ala nafsi su'an, aw ajurrahu ila muslim.
translation: O Allah, Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, Creator of the heavens and the earth, Lord and Sovereign of all things. I bear witness that there is no true god except You. I seek refuge in You from the evil of my own self, from the evil of Satan and his encouragement to associate partners with You, and from committing any evil against myself or bringing it upon another Muslim.

title: Supplication for Beneficial Knowledge
title_full: Supplication for Beneficial Knowledge
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْماً نَافِعاً، وَرِزْقاً طَيِّباً، وَعَمَلاً مُتَقَبَّلاً.
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka 'ilman nafi'an, wa rizqan tayyiban, wa 'amalan mutaqabbala.
translation: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, wholesome provision, and deeds that are accepted.

title: Sayyid al-Istighfar
title_full: Sayyid al-Istighfar (The Master Supplication for Forgiveness)
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ، أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ، وَأَبُوءُ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ.
transliteration: Allahumma Anta Rabbi la ilaha illa Anta, khalaqtani wa ana 'abduk, wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika mastata'tu, a'udhu bika min sharri ma sana'tu, abu'u laka bi-ni'matika 'alayya, wa abu'u bi-dhanbi faghfir li fa-innahu la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa Anta.
translation: O Allah, You are my Lord, there is no true god except You. You created me and I am Your servant, and I abide by Your covenant and Your promise as much as I am able. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done. I admit to You Your blessings upon me, and I admit to You my sin, so forgive me, for indeed, none can forgive sins except You.

title: Salat al-Ibrahimiyyah
title_full: Salat al-Ibrahimiyyah (Sending Blessings upon the Prophet)
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ، وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ.
transliteration: Allahumma salli 'ala Muhammadin wa 'ala ali Muhammadin kama sallayta 'ala Ibrahima, wa 'ala ali Ibrahima innaka Hamidun Majid.
translation: O Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad and upon the family of Muhammad, just as You sent prayers upon Abraham and upon the family of Abraham. Indeed, You are Praiseworthy, Full of Glory. evening supplications (أذكار المساء)

title: Surah Al-Ikhlas, Surah Al-Falaq, and Surah An-Nas
title_full: Surah Al-Ikhlas, Surah Al-Falaq, and Surah An-Nas
arabic: سُورَةُ الإِخْلَاص . (٣ مَرَّات) سُورَةُ الفَلَق . (٣ مَرَّات) سُورَةُ النَّاس . (٣ مَرَّات)
transliteration: Surat Al-Ikhlas. (3 marrat) Surat Al-Falaq. (3 marrat) Surat An-Nas. (3 marrat)
translation: Surah Al-Ikhlas. (3 times) Surah Al-Falaq. (3 times) Surah An-Nas. (3 times)

title: Declaration of Monotheism
title_full: Declaration of Monotheism
arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ المُلْكُ وَلَهُ الحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ. (مرة، أو ١٠ مرات، أو ١٠٠ مرة)
transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd, wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir. (Marrah, aw 10 marrat, aw 100 marrah)
translation: There is no true god except Allah alone, Who has no partner. To Him belongs dominion, and to Him belongs praise, and He is Able to do all things. (1 time, 10 times, or 100 times)
reference: البخاري (٦٤٠٣)، ومسلم (٢٦٩١) أبو داود (٥٠٧٧) (Al-Bukhari: 6403, Muslim: 2691, Abu Dawud: 5077)

title: Glorification of Allah
title_full: Glorification of Allah
arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ. (١٠٠ مرة)
transliteration: Subhanallahi wa bihamdih. (100 marrah)
translation: Glory be to Allah and pristine is His praise. (100 times)

title: Protection Against Harm
title_full: Protection Against Harm
arabic: بِاسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ. (٣ مَرَّات)
transliteration: Bismillahil-ladhi la yadurru ma'as-mihi shay'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'i wa huwas-sami'ul-'alim. (3 marrat)
translation: In the name of Allah, with Whose name nothing can cause harm on earth or in the heaven, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing. (3 times)
reference: أبو داود (٥٠٨٨) الترمذي (٣٣٨٨) ابن ماجه (٣٨٦٩) (Abu Dawud: 5088, At-Tirmidhi: 3388, Ibn Majah: 3869)

title: Protection with Allah's Perfect Words
title_full: Protection with Allah's Perfect Words
arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ. (٣ مَرَّات)
transliteration: A'udhu bi-kalimatil-lahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq. (3 marrat)
translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created. (3 times)

title: Contentment with Allah, Islam, and the Prophet
title_full: Contentment with Allah, Islam, and the Prophet
arabic: رَضِيتُ بِاللهِ رَبَّاً، وَبِالْإِسْلَامِ دِيناً، وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ نَبِيَّاً.
transliteration: Raditu billahi Rabban, wa bil-Islami dinan, wa bi-Muhammadin (Sallallahu 'alayhi wa sallam) Nabiyya.
translation: I am pleased with Allah as my Lord, with Islam as my religion, and with Muhammad ﷺ as a Prophet.

title: Sufficiency in Allah
title_full: Sufficiency in Allah
arabic: حَسْبِيَ اللهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ. (٧ مَرَّات)
transliteration: Hasbiyallahu la ilaha illa hu, 'alayhi tawakkaltu wa huwa Rabbul-'Arshil-'Azim. (7 marrat)
translation: Allah is sufficient for me. There is no true god except Him. In Him I put my trust, and He is the Lord of the Mighty Throne. (7 times)

title: Affirmation of the Pure Fitrah and Religion
title_full: Affirmation of the Pure Fitrah and Religion (Evening)
arabic: أَمْسَيْنَا عَلَى فِطْرَةِ الْإِسْلَامِ، وَكَلِمَةِ الْإِخْلَاصِ، وَسُنَّةِ نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ، وَمِلَّةِ أَبِينَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ، حَنِيفاً مُسْلِماً وَمَا كَانَ مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ.
transliteration: Amsayna 'ala fitratil-Islam, wa kalimatil-ikhlas, wa sunnati Nabiyyina Muhammadin (Sallallahu 'alayhi wa sallam), wa millati abina Ibrahima, hanifan musliman wa ma kana minal-mushrikin.
translation: We have entered the evening upon the natural disposition of Islam, the word of sincere faith, the religion of our Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, and the faith of our father Abraham, upright and submitting to Allah, and he was not of those who associate partners with Him.

title: Evening Supplication for the Good of the Night
title_full: Evening Supplication for the Good of the Night
arabic: أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ، رَبِّ أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ مَا فِي هَذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ، وَخَيْرَ مَا بَعْدَهَا، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا فِي هَذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ وَشَرِّ مَا بَعْدَهَا، رَبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْكَسَلِ وَسُوءِ الْكِبَرِ، رَبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابٍ فِي النَّارِ، وَعَذَابٍ فِي الْقَبْرِ.
transliteration: Amsayna wa amsal-mulku lillah, wal-hamdu lillah, la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir. Rabbi as'aluka khayra ma fi hadhihil-laylati, wa khayra ma ba'daha, wa a'uhudhu bika min sharri ma fi hadhihil-laylati wa sharri ma ba'daha. Rabbi a'udhu bika minal-kasali wa su'il-kibar, Rabbi a'udhu bika min 'adhabin fin-nari, wa 'adhabin fil-qabr.
translation: We have entered the evening, and the dominion belongs to Allah, and all praise is due to Allah. There is no true god except Allah alone, Who has no partner. To Him belongs dominion, and to Him belongs praise, and He is Able to do all things. My Lord, I ask You for the good of this night and the good of what follows it, and I seek refuge in You from the evil of this night and the evil of what follows it. My Lord, I seek refuge in You from laziness and the hardships of old age. My Lord, I seek refuge in You from punishment in the Fire and punishment in the grave.

title: Entering the Evening by Allah's Grace
title_full: Entering the Evening by Allah's Grace
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا، وَبِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا، وَبِكَ نَحْيَا، وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ، وَإِلَيْكَ المَصِيرُ.
transliteration: Allahumma bika amsayna, wa bika asbahna, wa bika nahya, wa bika namutu, wa ilaykal-masir.
translation: O Allah, by You we enter the evening, and by You we enter the morning, by You we live, and by You we die, and to You is the final return.
reference: النسائي في عمل اليوم والليلة (٥٦٩) (Al-Nasa'i in 'Amal al-Yawm wal-Laylah: 569)

title: Bearing Witness to Monotheism
title_full: Bearing Witness to Monotheism (Evening)
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَمْسَيْتُ أُشْهِدُكَ، وَأُشْهِدُ حَمَلَةَ عَرْشِكَ، وَمَلَائِكَتَكَ، وَجَمِيعَ خَلْقِكَ، أَنَّكَ أَنْتَ اللهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ [وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ] وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّداً عَبْدُكَ وَرَسُولُكَ. (مرة أو مرتين أو ٣ مرات أو ٤ مرات)
transliteration: Allahumma inni amsaytu ush-hiduka, wa ush-hidu hamalata 'arshika, wa mala'ikataka, wa jami'a khalqika, annaka Antallahu la ilaha illa Anta [wahdaka la sharika lak] wa anna Muhammadan 'abduka wa Rasuluk. (Marrah aw marratayn aw 3 marrat aw 4 marrat)
translation: O Allah, I have entered the evening and I call You to witness, and I call the bearers of Your Throne, Your angels, and all of Your creation to witness, that You are Allah, there is no true god except You [alone, You have no partner], and that Muhammad is Your servant and Your Messenger. (1, 2, 3, or 4 times)

title: Gratitude for Blessings
title_full: Gratitude for Blessings (Evening)
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ مَا أَمْسَى بِي مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ أَوْ بِأَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ فَمِنْكَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ، فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَلَكَ الشُّكْرُ.
transliteration: Allahumma ma amsa bi min ni'matin aw bi-ahadin min khalqika faminka wahdaka la sharika lak, falakal-hamdu wa lakash-shukr.
translation: O Allah, whatever blessing has come to me or to any of Your creation this evening is from You alone, You have no partner. To You belongs all praise and to You belongs all thanks.

title: Supplication of the Ever-Living
title_full: Supplication of the Ever-Living
arabic: يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ أَسْتَغِيثُ أَصْلِحْ لِي شَأْنِي كُلَّهُ وَلَا تَكِلْنِي إِلَى نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ.
transliteration: Ya Hayyu Ya Qayyumu bi-rahmatika astaghith, aslih li sha'ni kullahu wa la takilni ila nafsi tarfata 'ayn.
translation: O Ever-Living, O Sustainer, by Your mercy I seek help. Rectify all of my affairs for me, and do not leave me to myself even for the blink of an eye.

title: Prayer for Well-being and Protection from Misbelief
title_full: Prayer for Well-being and Protection from Misbelief
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَدَنِي، اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي سَمْعِي، اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَصَرِي، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْكُفْرِ وَالْفَقْرِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ. (٣ مَرَّات)
transliteration: Allahumma 'afini fi badani, Allahumma 'afini fi sam'i, Allahumma 'afini fi basari, la ilaha illa Anta. Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-kufri wal-faqr, Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min 'adhabil-qabr, la ilaha illa Anta. (3 marrat)
translation: O Allah, grant me well-being in my body. O Allah, grant me well-being in my hearing. O Allah, grant me well-being in my sight. There is no true god except You. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from disbelief and poverty. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave. There is no true god except You. (3 times)

title: Prayer for Well-being and Comprehensive Security
title_full: Prayer for Well-being and Comprehensive Security
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي دِينِي وَدُنْيَايَ وَأَهْلِي وَمَالِي، اللَّهُمَّ اسْتُرْ عَوْرَاتِي وَآمِنْ رَوْعَاتِي، اللَّهُمَّ احْفَظْنِي مِنْ بَيْنِ يَدَيَّ، وَمِنْ خَلْفِي، وَعَنْ يَمِينِي، وَعَنْ شِمَالِي، وَمِنْ فَوْقِي، وَأَعُوذُ بِعَظَمَتِكَ أَنْ أُغْتَالَ مِنْ تَحْتِي.
transliteration: Allahumma inni as'alukal-'afiyah fid-dunya wal-akhirah. Allahumma inni as'alukal-'afwa wal-'afiyah fi dini wa dunyaya wa ahli wa mali. Allahumma-stur 'awrati wa amin raw'ati. Allahumma-hfazni min bayni yadayya, wa min khalfi, wa 'an yamini, wa 'an shimali, wa min fawqi, wa a'udhu bi-'azamatika an ughtala min tahti.
translation: O Allah, I ask You for well-being in this world and the Next. O Allah, I ask You for forgiveness and well-being in my religion, my worldly life, my family, and my wealth. O Allah, conceal my faults and calm my fears. O Allah, protect me from before me, from behind me, from my right, from my left, and from above me; and I seek refuge in Your greatness from being swallowed up from beneath me.

title: Lord of the Unseen and Protection from Evil
title_full: Lord of the Unseen and Protection from Evil
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ عَالِمَ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ، فَاطِرَ السَّمَوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ، رَبَّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمَلِيكَهُ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي، وَمِنْ شَرِّ الشَّيْطَانِ وَشِرْكِهِ، [وَأَنْ أَقْتَرِفَ عَلَى نَفْسِي سُوءاً، أَوْ أَجُرَّهُ إِلَى مُسْلِمٍ].
transliteration: Allahumma 'Alimal-ghaybi wash-shahadah, Fatiras-samawati wal-ard, Rabba kulli shay'in wa malikah, ash-hadu an la ilaha illa Anta, a'udhu bika min sharri nafsi, wa min sharrish-shaytani wa shirkih, [wa an aqtarifa 'ala nafsi su'an, aw ajurrahu ila muslim].
translation: O Allah, Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, Creator of the heavens and the earth, Lord and Sovereign of all things. I bear witness that there is no true god except You. I seek refuge in You from the evil of my own self, from the evil of Satan and his encouragement to associate partners with You, [and from committing any evil against myself or bringing it upon another Muslim].

title: Sayyid al-Istighfar
title_full: Sayyid al-Istighfar (The Master Supplication for Forgiveness)
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ، أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ، وَأَبُوءُ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ.
transliteration: Allahumma Anta Rabbi la ilaha illa Anta, khalaqtani wa ana 'abduk, wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika mastata'tu, a'udhu bika min sharri ma sana'tu, abu'u laka bi-ni'matika 'alayya, wa abu'u bi-dhanbi faghfir li fa-innahu la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa Anta.
translation: O Allah, You are my Lord, there is no true god except You. You created me and I am Your servant, and I abide by Your covenant and Your promise as much as I am able. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done. I admit to You Your blessings upon me, and I admit to You my sin, so forgive me, for indeed, none can forgive sins except You.

title: Recitation of the Last Two Verses of Surah Al-Baqarah
title_full: Recitation of the Last Two Verses of Surah Al-Baqarah
arabic: قِرَاءَةُ الآيَتَيْنِ الأَخِيرَتَيْنِ مِنْ سُورَةِ البَقَرَةِ {آمَنَ الرَّسُولُ بِمَا أُنْزِلَ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ رَبِّهِ...}
transliteration: Qira'at al-ayatayn al-akhiratayn min Surat-il-Baqarah (Amanar-rasulu bima unzila ilayhi mir-Rabbihi...)
translation: Recitation of the last two verses of Surah Al-Baqarah ("The Messenger has believed in what was revealed to him from his Lord...")

title: Salat al-Ibrahimiyyah
title_full: Salat al-Ibrahimiyyah (Sending Blessings upon the Prophet)
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ، وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ.
transliteration: Allahumma salli 'ala Muhammadin wa 'ala ali Muhammadin kama sallayta 'ala Ibrahima, wa 'ala ali Ibrahima innaka Hamidun Majid.
translation: O Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad and upon the family of Muhammad, just as You sent prayers upon Abraham and upon the family of Abraham. Indeed, You are Praiseworthy, Full of Glory.

title: Seeking Forgiveness and Supplicating for Peace
title_full: Seeking Forgiveness and Supplicating for Peace
arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ (٣ مَرَّات). اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلَامُ وَمِنْكَ السَّلَامُ تَبَارَكْتَ ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ.
transliteration: Astagfiru-llah (3 marrat). Allahumma Antas-Salamu wa minkas-salamu tabarakta dhal-jalali wal-ikram.
translation: I seek the forgiveness of Allah (3 times). O Allah, You are Peace and from You comes peace. Blessed are You, Owner of majesty and honor.

title: Affirmation of Monotheism and Submission
title_full: Affirmation of Monotheism and Submission
arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ، لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَلَا نَعْبُدُ إِلَّا إِيَّاهُ لَهُ النِّعْمَةُ وَلَهُ الْفَضْلُ وَلَهُ الثَّنَاءُ الْحَسَنُ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ الدِّينَ وَلَوْ كَرِهَ الْكَافِرُونَ.
transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir. La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah, la ilaha illallahu wa la na'budu illa iyyah, lahun-ni'matu wa lahul-fadlu wa lahuth-thana'ul-hasan, la ilaha illallahu mukhlisina lahud-dina wa law karihal-kafirun.
translation: There is no true god except Allah alone, Who has no partner. To Him belongs dominion, and to Him belongs praise, and He is Able to do all things. There is no power and no strength except with Allah. There is no true god except Allah, and we worship none but Him. From Him come all blessings and favors, and to Him belongs ideal praise. There is no true god except Allah, and we are sincere in making our religion purely for Him, even if the disbelievers detest it.

title: Relying on Allah's Decree
title_full: Relying on Allah's Decree
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا مَانِعَ لِمَا أَعْطَيْتَ وَلَا مُعْطِيَ لِمَا مَنَعْتَ، وَلَا يَنْفَعُ ذَا الْجَدِّ مِنْكَ الْجَدُّ.
transliteration: Allahumma la mani'a lima a'tayta wa la mu'tiya lima mana'ta, wa la yanfa'u dhal-jaddi minkal-jadd.
translation: O Allah, none can prevent what You have given, and none can give what You have prevented, and no wealth or majesty can avail a person against Your will.

title: Tasbih, Tahmid, and Takbir
title_full: Tasbih, Tahmid, and Takbir (Completing One Hundred)
arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ (٣٣)، الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ (٣٣)، اللهُ أَكْبَرُ (٣٣)، وَيُقَالُ تَمَامَ الْمِائَةِ: (لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ).
transliteration: Subhanallah (33), Alhamdulillah (33), Allahu Akbar (33). Wa yuqalu tamamal-mi'ah: (La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir).
translation: Glory be to Allah (33 times), Praise be to Allah (33 times), Allah is the Most Great (33 times). To complete one hundred, say: (There is no true god except Allah alone, Who has no partner. To Him belongs dominion, and to Him belongs praise, and He is Able to do all things).

title: Recitations from the Quran
title_full: Recitations from the Quran
arabic: قِرَاءَةُ آيَةِ الْكُرْسِي. سُورَةُ الْإِخْلَاص. (مَرَّةً وَاحِدَةً) سُورَةُ الْفَلَق. (مَرَّةً وَاحِدَةً) سُورَةُ النَّاس. (مَرَّةً وَاحِدَةً)
transliteration: Qira'atu Ayat-il-Kursi. Suratul-Ikhlas. (Marratan wahidah) Suratul-Falaq. (Marratan wahidah) Suratun-Nas. (Marratan wahidah)
translation: Recitation of Ayat al-Kursi (The Verse of the Throne). Surah Al-Ikhlas. (1 time) Surah Al-Falaq. (1 time) Surah An-Nas. (1 time)
reference: ابن السني في عمل اليوم والليلة (١٢١)، أبو داود (١٥٢٣)، الترمذي (٢٩٠٣) (Ibn al-Sunni in 'Amal al-Yawm wal-Laylah: 121, Abu Dawud: 1523, At-Tirmidhi: 2903)

title: Specific Supplication After Fajr and Maghrib Prayers
title_full: Specific Supplication After Fajr and Maghrib Prayers
arabic: يُقَالُ بَعْدَ صَلَاةِ الْفَجْرِ وَصَلَاةِ الْمَغْرِبِ: (لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ). (١٠ مَرَّات)
transliteration: Yuqalu ba'da salatil-fajri wa salatil-maghrib: (La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu yuhyi wa yumitu wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir). (10 marrat)
translation: To be said after the Dawn (Fajr) prayer and Sunset (Maghrib) prayer: (There is no true god except Allah alone, Who has no partner. To Him belongs dominion, and to Him belongs praise. He gives life and causes death, and He is Able to do all things). (10 times)

title: Etiquettes of Sleep
title_full: Etiquettes of Sleep
arabic: مِنْ آدَابِ النَّوْمِ: ١. الْوُضُوءُ. ٢. التَّسْمِيَةُ وَنَفْضُ الْفِرَاشِ. ٣. النَّوْمُ عَلَى الشِّقِّ الْأَيْمَنِ. ٤. وَضْعُ الْيَدِ الْيُمْنَى تَحْتَ الْخَدِّ.
transliteration: Min adabin-nawm: Al-wudu'. At-tasmiyatu wa nafdul-firash. An-nawmu 'ala ash-shiqqil-ayman. Wad'ul-yadil-yumna tahtal-khadd.
translation: From the etiquettes of sleep: Performing ablution. Saying 'Bismillah' (In the name of Allah) and dusting off the bed. Sleeping on the right side. Placing the right hand under the cheek.

title: Supplication in Allah's Name
title_full: Supplication in Allah's Name
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِاسْمِكَ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا.
transliteration: Allahumma bismika amutu wa ahya.
translation: O Allah, in Your name I die and I live.

title: Recitation of Ayat al-Kursi
title_full: Recitation of Ayat al-Kursi
arabic: قِرَاءَةُ آيَةِ الْكُرْسِي.
transliteration: Qira'atu Ayat-il-Kursi.
translation: Recitation of Ayat al-Kursi (The Verse of the Throne).

title: Gratitude for Sustenance and Shelter
title_full: Gratitude for Sustenance and Shelter
arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنَا وَسَقَانَا وَكَفَانَا وَآوَانَا، فَكَمْ مِمَّنْ لَا كَافِيَ لَهُ وَلَا مُؤْوِيَ.
transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi at'amana wa saqana wa kafana wa awana, fakam mimman la kafiya lahu wa la mu'wi.
translation: All praise is due to Allah Who fed us, gave us drink, sufficed us, and gave us shelter, for how many are there who have no one to suffice them and no one to give them shelter.

title: Placing the Body in Allah's Care
title_full: Placing the Body in Allah's Care
arabic: بِاسْمِكَ رَبِّي وَضَعْتُ جَنْبِي وَبِكَ أَرْفَعُهُ، إِنْ أَمْسَكْتَ نَفْسِي فَارْحَمْهَا وَإِنْ أَرْسَلْتَهَا فَاحْفَظْهَا بِمَا تَحْفَظُ بِهِ عِبَادَكَ الصَّالِحِينَ.
transliteration: Bismika Rabbi wada'tu janbi wa bika arfa'uh, in amsakta nafsi farhamha wa in arsaltaha fahfazha bima tahfazu bihi 'ibadakas-salihin.
translation: In Your name, my Lord, I lay down my side and by You I raise it. If You take my soul, have mercy on it, and if You send it back, protect it as You protect Your righteous servants.

title: Protection from the Punishment
title_full: Protection from the Punishment
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ قِنِي عَذَابَكَ يَوْمَ تَبْعَثُ عِبَادَكَ. (٣ مَرَّات)
transliteration: Allahumma qini 'adhabaka yawma tab'athu 'ibadak. (3 marrat)
translation: O Allah, protect me from Your punishment on the Day You resurrect Your servants. (3 times)

title: Tasbih, Tahmid, and Takbir Before Sleep
title_full: Tasbih, Tahmid, and Takbir Before Sleep
arabic: اللهُ أَكْبَرُ (٣٤ مَرَّةً)، وَسُبْحَانَ اللهِ (٣٣ مَرَّةً)، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ (٣٣ مَرَّةً).
transliteration: Allahu Akbar (34 marrah), wa Subhanallah (33 marrah), wal-Hamdu lillah (33 marrah).
translation: Allah is the Most Great (34 times), Glory be to Allah (33 times), and Praise be to Allah (33 times).

title: Final Supplication of Entrustment to Allah
title_full: Final Supplication of Entrustment to Allah
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَسْلَمْتُ نَفْسِي إِلَيْكَ، وَوَجَّهْتُ وَجْهِي إِلَيْكَ، وَفَوَّضْتُ أَمْرِي إِلَيْكَ، وَأَلْجَأْتُ ظَهْرِي إِلَيْكَ، رَغْبَةً وَرَهْبَةً إِلَيْكَ، لَا مَلْجَأَ وَلَا مَنْجَا مِنْكَ إِلَّا إِلَيْكَ، آمَنْتُ بِكِتَابِكَ الَّذِي أَنْزَلْتَ، وَنَبِيِّكَ الَّذِي أَرْسَلْتَ.
transliteration: Allahumma aslamtu nafsi ilayk, wa wajjahtu wajhi ilayk, wa fawwadtu amri ilayk, wa alja'tu zahri ilayk, raghbatan wa rahbatan ilayk, la malja'a wa la manja minka illa ilayk, amantu bikitabikal-ladhi anzalt, wa nabiyyikal-ladhi arsalt.
translation: O Allah, I submit myself to You, turn my face to You, entrust my affairs to You, and lay my back down relying on You, out of hope and fear of You. There is no refuge and no salvation from You except in You. I believe in Your Book which You have revealed and in Your Prophet whom You have sent.

title: Cupping the Hands and Reciting the Three Protectors
title_full: Cupping the Hands and Reciting the Three Protectors
arabic: يَجْمَعُ كَفَّيْهِ ثُمَّ يَنْفُثُ فِيهِمَا فَيَقْرَأُ فِيهِمَا: {قُلْ هُوَ اللهُ أَحَدٌ} وَ {قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ} وَ {قُل * أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ} ثُمَّ يَمْسَحُ بِهِمَا مَا اسْتَطَاعَ مِنْ جَسَدِهِ يَبْدَأُ بِهِمَا عَلَى رَأْسِهِ وَوَجْهِهِ وَمَا أَقْبَلَ مِنْ جَسَدِهِ، يَفْعَلُ ذَلِكَ. (٣ مَرَّات)
transliteration: Yajma'u kaffayhi thumma yanfuthu fihima fayaqra'u fihima: {Qul Huwallahu Ahad} wa {Qul A'udhu Bi-Rabbil-Falaq} wa {Qul A'udhu Bi-Rabbin-Nas} thumma yamsahu bihima mastata'a min jasadihi yabda'u bihima 'ala ra'sihi wa wajhihi wa ma aqbala min jasadih,yaf'alu dhalik. (3 marrat)
translation: He cups his palms together, blows over them gently, and recites into them: Surah Al-Ikhlas, Surah Al-Falaq, and Surah An-Nas. Then he wipes over as much of his body as he can with them, starting with his head, his face, and the front of his body. He does that three times.

title: Supplication for Seeking Guidance
title_full: Supplication for Seeking Guidance (دعاء الاستخارة)
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَخِيرُكَ بِعِلْمِكَ وَأَسْتَقْدِرُكَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ الْعَظِيمِ، فَإِنَّكَ تَقْدِرُ وَلَا أَقْدِرُ، وَتَعْلَمُ وَلَا أَعْلَمُ، وَأَنْتَ عَلَّامُ الْغُيُوبِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَذَا الْأَمْرَ خَيْرٌ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي أَوْ قَالَ: عَاجِلِ أَمْرِي وَآجِلِهِ فَاقْدُرْهُ لِي وَيَسِّرْهُ لِي ثُمَّ بَارِكْ لِي فِيهِ، وَإِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَذَا الْأَمْرَ شَرٌّ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي أَوْ قَالَ: فِي عَاجِلِ أَمْرِي وَآجِلِهِ فَاصْرِفْهُ عَنِّي وَاصْرِفْنِي عَنْهُ، وَاقْدُرْ لِي الْخَيْرَ حَيْثُ كَانَ، ثُمَّ أَرْضِنِي بِهِ، قَالَ: وَيُسَمِّي حَاجَتَهُ.
transliteration: Allahumma inni astakhiruka bi'ilmika wa astaqdiruka biqudratika, wa as'aluka min fadlikal-'azim, fa'innaka taqdiru wa la aqdir, wa ta'lamu wa la a'lam, wa Anta 'Allamul-ghuyub. Allahumma in kunta ta'lamu anna hadhal-amra khayrun li fi dini wa ma'ashi wa 'aqibati amri (or he said: 'ajili amri wa ajilih) faqdurhu li wa yassirhu li thumma barik li fih. Wa in kunta ta'lamu anna hadhal-amra sharrun li fi dini wa ma'ashi wa 'aqibati amri (or he said: fi 'ajili amri wa ajilih) fasrifhu 'anni wasrifni 'anh, waqdur liyal-khayra haythu kana thumma ardini bih. (He adds: and he names his need).
translation: O Allah, I seek Your guidance through Your knowledge, and I seek power through Your might, and I ask You of Your great bounty. For surely You are capable and I am not, and You know and I do not, and You are the Knower of the unseen. O Allah, if You know that this matter is good for me in my religion, my livelihood, and the outcome of my affair (or he said: in the short term and the long term), then decree it for me, make it easy for me, and then bless me in it. And if You know that this matter is bad for me in my religion, my livelihood, and the outcome of my affair (or he said: in the short term and the long term), then turn it away from me and turn me away from it, and decree for me what is good wherever it may be, and make me pleased with it. (He then specifies his need).

title: Supplication for Distress
title_full: Supplication for Distress (دعاء الكرب)
arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ الْعَظِيمُ الْحَلِيمُ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ رَبُّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَرَبُّ الْأَرْضِ وَرَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْكَرِيمِ.
transliteration: La ilaha illallahul-'Azimul-Halim, la ilaha illallahu Rabbul-'Arshil-'azim, la ilaha illallahu Rabbus-samawati wa Rabbul-ardi wa Rabbul-'Arshil-karim.
translation: There is no deity worthy of worship except Allah, the Magnificent, the Forbearing. There is no deity worthy of worship except Allah, the Lord of the Magnificent Throne. There is no deity worthy of worship except Allah, the Lord of the heavens, the Lord of the earth, and the Lord of the Noble Throne.

title: Supplication for Anxiety or Sorrow
title_full: Supplication for Anxiety or Sorrow (دعاء الهم أو الحزن)
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي عَبْدُكَ وَابْنُ عَبْدِكَ، وَابْنُ أَمَتِكَ، نَاصِيَتِي بِيدِكَ مَاضٍ فِيَّ حُكْمُكَ، عَدْلٌ فِيَّ قَضَاؤُكَ، أَسْأَلُكَ بِكُلِّ اسْمٍ هُوَ لَكَ سَمَّيْتَ بِهِ نَفْسَكَ...
transliteration: Allahumma inni 'abduka, wabnu 'abdika, wabnu amatika, nasiyati biyadika, madin fiyya hukmuka, 'adlun fiyya qada'uka, as'aluka bikullismin huwa laka sammayta bihi nafsak...
translation: O Allah, I am Your servant, the son of Your servant, the son of Your maidservant. My forelock is in Your hand, Your command over me is ever executed, and Your decree concerning me is perfectly just. I ask You by every name belonging to You which You have named Yourself...

title: Supplication for the Settlement of Debt
title_full: Supplication for the Settlement of Debt (دعاء قضاء الدين)
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ، وَأَغْنِني بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ.
transliteration: Allahummak-fini bihalalika 'an haramika, wa aghnini bifadlika 'amman siwak.
translation: O Allah, suffice me with what is lawful instead of what is unlawful, and make me independent of all others through Your grace.
